_comment: Synthetic input for the repo-router parity test. sfp_env_text is a three-row SFP_REPO_* registry; trp_env_text pins TRP_PARALLEL_SAFE=true so the task_id slug is folded into fix_src_path (single-worktree runs would drop it). argv passes an --intent-hint that matches the second row by exact slug (score 100) and a --task that carries a ClickUp task id containing a hyphen — exercises slugify() on the task suffix. Fixture carries no client source, no secrets, no absolute paths — sanitize-manifest.json records one path_leak replacement (the runtime REPO_ROOT prefix in fix_src_path) applied at compare time.
